message:
feat(conformance): add consolidated per-extension conformance report generator (bd-31j)

Add 624-line test module that reads existing conformance test results and
VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json to produce a unified report across all extension
conformance dimensions:

tests/conformance_report.rs:
- Generates CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md with per-extension pass/fail summary,
  tier coverage breakdown, and capability matrix
- Produces conformance_summary.json for machine-readable CI consumption
  (overall pass rate, per-tier stats, failing extensions list)
- Emits conformance_events.jsonl with structured per-extension log entries
  including test type, result, duration, and capability tags
- Reads from parity/, negative/, smoke/, and scenario report directories
- Cross-references VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json for tier and capability metadata

Run with: cargo test --test conformance_report generate_conformance_report -- --nocapture

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
